subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-04-25
subcodes.first_line: This night is a very blessed night, worthy of the utmost praise and joy for many reasons.
subcodes.first_line_orig: امشب شب مبارکی است شایان نهایت سرور و ستایش است بجهاتی چند اولا الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @East and West; communication between East and West, @unity in diversity, @oneness; unity of religion
